request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in the importance of a strong national defense. But with the rising threats we're facing, it's clear that our current volunteer system isn't enough. Many of our allies, like Sweden and Switzerland, have seen the value in a balanced approach to conscription. It's not about forcing our youth into service, but about ensuring we have a prepared and capable force to protect our freedoms. We can't afford to be caught off guard. #NationalSecurity #Conscription
